release_goal: End users who run ts-project-init-advisor get the golden agent-context template set (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .claude/CLAUDE.md, .claude/goverance_CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md) — created directly where absent, recommended as MODIFY tasks where files already exist.
release_exit_criteria: Advisor run in a project with none of the five golden files present creates all five directly from golden templates, byte-identical to src/project_root_structure/ sources
Advisor run in a project with an existing CLAUDE.md emits a MODIFY recommendation task in PROJECT_INIT_PLAN.md and does not touch the existing file
Golden templates ship inside the advisor skill at assets/golden/, populated by a build-time sync from src/project_root_structure/, and the release build fails on parity mismatch between the two
Coexistence posture with install.sh SCAFFOLD=y documented (delegate, deprecate, or bootstrap-only)

epics.title: Golden agent-context templates, recommended-to-add by ts-project-init-advisor
epics.notes: Scope v3 + technical requirement recorded in .agents/ts-project-planner/plan.json epic notes; pivot history in .agents/discovery.json idea-001.
